channel.title: Endo Morning Brief
channel.description: Daily endodontic literature briefing for an endodontic specialty resident. Curated PubMed summaries with clinical takeaways and ABE board relevance.
channel.itunes:author: Endo Morning Brief

item.title: ABE Board Review — Dental Trauma Management: Luxations, Avulsions, and Root Fractures — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review of classic and landmark endodontic literature covering dental trauma management: luxations, avulsions, and root fractures. High-yield ABE board preparation with landmark papers and clinical pearls.

item.title: ABE Board Review — EDTA, Chelation, and the Smear Layer — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering smear layer composition and the removal debate, EDTA mechanism and 17% standard protocol, optimal contact time, final irrigation sequence (NaOCl-EDTA-NaOCl), growth factor release in regenerative protocols, NaOCl-CHX precipitate, and sealer interaction. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Sodium Hypochlorite: Mechanism, Concentration, and the NaOCl Accident — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering NaOCl antimicrobial mechanism (chloramination, oxidation), tissue dissolution property, concentration debate, volume and contact time optimization, the NaOCl accident presentation and step-by-step management, and prevention strategies. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Instrument Separation: Risk Factors, Management, and Prognosis — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering NiTi separation incidence, cyclic vs torsional failure mechanisms, retrieval vs bypass vs leave-in-place decision tree, Spili/Parashos/Messer outcome evidence, prognostic factors, and prevention strategies. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — NiTi Metallurgy and Heat Treatment — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering NiTi superelasticity and austenite-martensite phase transformation, M-Wire, CM Wire, Blue/Gold Wire, MaxWire, cyclic vs torsional fatigue mechanisms, rotary vs reciprocating motion, and clinical implications of heat treatment. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Calcium Hydroxide: Mechanism, Antimicrobial Spectrum, and Clinical Evidence — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering calcium hydroxide chemistry (pH 12.5, hydroxyl ion dissociation), antimicrobial spectrum and limitations against E. faecalis, Sjogren 1997 landmark outcome data, LPS neutralization, dentin weakening controversy, and clinical applications. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Persistent and Secondary Infections: E. faecalis and the Biofilm Concept — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering persistent vs secondary infection definitions, Enterococcus faecalis survival characteristics, biofilm architecture and resistance (1000-1500x), Nair and Ricucci histologic evidence, Siqueira's four causes of failure, and retreatment strategies. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Primary Endodontic Infections: Polymicrobial Ecology and Anaerobic Dominance — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering polymicrobial ecology of the infected canal, Sundqvist's anaerobic culture revolution, dominant genera (Prevotella, Fusobacterium, Porphyromonas, Peptostreptococcus), ecological succession, gram-negative correlation with symptoms, and routes of infection. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — The Germfree Rat and Koch's Postulates for Endodontics — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering Kakehashi 1965 germfree rat experiment, Sundqvist 1976 human confirmation, Moller and Fabricius monkey studies, Koch's postulates applied to polymicrobial endodontic disease, and the Sjogren 1997 culture-outcome correlation. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Bioceramic Sealers and MTA — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering MTA composition and Torabinejad's original research, alkaline pH bioactivity, Biodentine and the ESSENCE trial, clinical applications (VPT, perforation repair, apexification, root-end fill), and bioceramic sealer properties. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Obturation Principles and Techniques — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering Schilder's 1967 obturation philosophy, gutta-percha phases, lateral vs warm vertical compaction, carrier-based systems, sealer classification, smear layer management, and apical fill level evidence. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Endodontic Diagnosis and Pulp Testing — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering AAE 2009 diagnostic terminology, pulp sensibility vs vitality testing, cold/heat/EPT physiology, percussion and bite testing, CBCT indications, and radiographic interpretation. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Periapical Pathology and the Immune Response — 2026-04-10
item.description: Board review covering Kakehashi germfree rat study, acute vs chronic periapical inflammation, granuloma formation, pocket vs true cysts, Nair 1997, RANKL/OPG axis, cytokine cascades, and periapical healing. High-yield ABE board preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Medically Compromised Patients Part 2: Bisphosphonates, Immunosuppression, Renal/Hepatic Disease, and Pregnancy — 2026-04-09
item.description: Board review covering MRONJ and bisphosphonate risk stratification, immunosuppressed patients, drug dosing in renal and hepatic disease, and endodontic management during pregnancy. High-yield ABE board preparation with clinical pearls and rapid-fire review.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Medically Compromised Patients Part 1: Cardiovascular Disease, Anticoagulants, and Diabetes — 2026-04-09
item.description: Board review covering cardiac prophylaxis under 2007 AHA guidelines, anticoagulant and antiplatelet management (warfarin, DOACs, aspirin/clopidogrel), and diabetes mellitus effects on periapical healing. High-yield ABE board preparation with clinical pearls and rapid-fire review.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Analgesics and Pain Management in Endodontics — 2026-04-09
item.description: Board review covering post-endodontic pain pathophysiology, ibuprofen plus acetaminophen multimodal analgesia, preoperative dexamethasone, opioid limitations, flare-up management, and the AAE position on leaving teeth open. High-yield ABE board preparation with rapid-fire review.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Antibiotics in Endodontics: Indications, Drug Selection, and Stewardship — 2026-04-09
item.description: Board review covering AAE position on antibiotic use, systemic vs localized infection criteria, first-line and alternative drug selection, cardiac prophylaxis under 2007 AHA guidelines, and antimicrobial stewardship principles. High-yield ABE board preparation with rapid-fire review.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Vital Pulp Therapy: Direct Pulp Capping, Pulpotomy, and the Modern Biologic Approach — 2026-04-09
item.description: Board review of classic and landmark endodontic literature covering vital pulp therapy: direct pulp capping, pulpotomy, and the modern biologic approach. High-yield ABE board preparation with landmark papers and clinical pearls.

item.title: Endo Morning Brief - March 29, 2026
item.description: 10 recent endodontic papers covering: ketorolac for post-RCT pain management, immunomodulatory strategies in vital pulp therapy, resin-modified vs conventional calcium silicate outcomes, hard tissue barrier detection timing, regenerative endo histopathology, bioceramic clinical survey, NiTi glide path meta-analysis, mandibular molar danger zone CBCT geometry, bioceramic sealer retreatment solvent, and laser-activated irrigation vs E. faecalis biofilm.

item.title: Endo Morning Brief - March 30, 2026
item.description: Ten recent papers covering irrigation activation meta-regression, photon-counting CT for VRF diagnosis, NiTi heat treatment advances, hypercementosis management, CMV in periapical lesions, laser-activated irrigation for post bond strength, peracetic acid as a novel irrigant, PANoptosis in pulp inflammation, ion-releasing bioactive glasses for VPT, and hesperetin scaffolds for pulp-dentin regeneration.

item.title: Endo Morning Brief ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ March 31, 2026
item.description: Eleven papers covering irrigation activation and postoperative pain, SWEEPS laser and fiber post retention, Er,Cr:YSGG biofilm disinfection, peracetic acid irrigant, smart bioactive glasses for VPT, injectable hydrogels for pulp repair, FOXE1 and PANoptosis in pulpitis, hesperetin scaffolds for regeneration, hypercementosis review, and OCT for vertical root fracture detection.

item.title: ABE Board Review - Single Visit vs Multiple Visit Root Canal Treatment - March 30, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on single visit versus multiple visit root canal treatment. Covers landmark papers by Sjogren, Figdor, Sundqvist, Sathorn, Parashos, Messer, Figini, Manfredi, Mergoni, Schwendicke, Waltimo, Trope, and Haapasalo with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ Cleaning and Shaping Principles (Schilder) ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ March 30, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on cleaning and shaping principles. Covers landmark papers by Schilder, Weine, Abou-Rass, Walia, Marshall and Pappin, and Peters with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review Ã¢ÂÂ Root Canal Anatomy and Morphology Ã¢ÂÂ March 31, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on root canal anatomy and morphology. Covers landmark papers by Vertucci, Hess, Weine, Kulild and Peters, de Deus, Pineda and Kuttler, and Ahmed with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review â Pulp Biology and the Dentin-Pulp Complex â April 01, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on pulp biology and the dentin-pulp complex. Covers landmark papers by BrÃ¤nnstrÃ¶m, Pashley, MjÃ¶r, Smith, Gronthos, and Byers with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Microbiology of Endodontic Infections — April 02, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on microbiology of endodontic infections. Covers landmark papers by Kakehashi, Sundqvist, Sjogren, Moller, Fabricius, Bystrom, Siqueira, and Nair with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Pulp Biology and the Dentin-Pulp Complex — April 08, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on pulp biology and the dentin-pulp complex. Covers pulp zones and architecture, odontoblast biology, dentin tubule physiology, primary vs secondary vs tertiary dentin, inflammatory signaling, nociception, and regenerative potential, with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Root Canal Irrigants: NaOCl, EDTA, and Chlorhexidine — April 08, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on root canal irrigants. Covers sodium hypochlorite concentration and mechanism, EDTA smear layer removal, chlorhexidine substantivity, precipitate formation, irrigation sequencing, activation methods (ultrasonic, sonic, laser), and the hydrodynamic model, with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Regenerative Endodontics and Revascularization — April 08, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on regenerative endodontics and revascularization. Covers the biology of immature necrotic teeth, AAE and ESE clinical protocols, scaffold biology, stem cell sources (SCAPs, DPSCs), growth factors, blood clot induction, MTA vs Biodentine cervical barriers, clinical outcomes vs apexification, and long-term follow-up evidence, with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.

item.title: ABE Board Review — Vital Pulp Therapy: Direct Pulp Cap, Pulpotomy, and Biodentine — April 08, 2026
item.description: Board review of classic endodontic literature on vital pulp therapy. Covers the biological basis for pulp preservation, calcium hydroxide vs MTA vs Biodentine outcomes, the shift from outcome pessimism to the biological approach, case selection criteria (reversible vs irreversible pulpitis), partial pulpotomy (Cvek procedure), full coronal pulpotomy, and landmark clinical trial evidence including the ESSENCE trial, with high-yield board pearls for ABE exam preparation.
